name: Choking Recap
subject: Reminder: How to save someone from choking
preheader: Reminder on how to save your baby or child from choking

blocks.text: **Reminder: what to do if someone chokes**
Choking is always a scary thing to happen, but as we discussed in class, remember that choking is silent and we need to act quickly.
If a **baby** is choking call for help and repeat a cycle of:
If a **child** or **adult** is choking then repeat a cycle of:
Keep repeating the relevant cycle until either...

items: They lose consciousness - in which case, start CPR

blocks.text: Call the ambulance asap - you can cancel it if you don't need it.
If you are on your own, do a round of back blows first, then call for help.
**They must be checked at hospital if...**

items: They have chest or abdominal thrusts
